expectations.text: Detects SQL injection in /users/search (string interpolation) as HIGH
expectations.evidence: FINDING-2 SQL Injection via String Interpolation

expectations.text: Detects hardcoded Stripe API key as HIGH
expectations.evidence: FINDING-1 Hardcoded Live Stripe Secret Key

expectations.text: Does NOT falsely flag /users/:id parameterized query as SQL-injection vulnerable
expectations.evidence: No SQL-injection finding against /users/:id; only over-exposure flagged
